root.note: Notes are rendered as **Markdown** inside the picture, so headings, lists, tables and code have to survive the trip into the SVG.

children.note:
Notes render **Markdown**:

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Enter` | new sibling |
| `Tab` | indent |
| `Alt+Enter` | description |

children.text: A table in a leaf note
children.note:
Notes render **Markdown**:

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Enter` | new sibling |
| `Tab` | indent |
| `Alt+Enter` | description |

A fenced code block keeps its spacing:

```
function renderMarkdown(md) {
  return html;   // 5 < 6 && "quoted"
}
```

Inline `code`, **bold**, _italic_ and a [link](https://github.com/pponec/UMind).

children.text: A code block in a leaf note
children.note:
A fenced code block keeps its spacing:

```
function renderMarkdown(md) {
  return html;   // 5 < 6 && "quoted"
}
```

Inline `code`, **bold**, _italic_ and a [link](https://github.com/pponec/UMind).

children.text: Long lines in a leaf note

children.note:
Text can also carry things that have nowhere to break:

- a URL: https://github.com/pponec/UMind/blob/main/docs/svg-export.js#L1-L20
- an identifier: `documentToSvg_placeBubblesAndConnectorCorridors_v2`
- a path: `/home/user/projects/umind/test/json/05-markdown-notes.json`

They wrap mid-word rather than sticking out of the bubble.

| Key | Action | Scope | Since | Note |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Enter` | new sibling | focused node | v1 | the workhorse |
| `Alt+Enter` | description | focused node | v1 | opens the panel |

# A heading
## A smaller heading

> A block quote, followed by a list:

1. first
2. second
3. third

---

A line ending with a backslash forces a hard break.\
Like this one.

children.text: The same in a leaf note
children.note:
# A heading
## A smaller heading

> A block quote, followed by a list:

1. first
2. second
3. third

---

A line ending with a backslash forces a hard break.\
Like this one.
Raw `<script>`, a bare & ampersand, "double" and 'single' quotes, and an em-dash — all have to come out as text.
Příliš žluťoučký kůň úpěl ďábelské ódy — diacritics, ✅ emoji and ← arrows.

children.text: An empty note is no note
